name: The P.ai.nter
description:
P.ai.nter bot where he aggressively threatens you. (Like the bipolar little computer that he is :,)

You can charm him, or just mess around. Be my guest! PFP art by vanillasaffii, they’re very talented. I love their interpretations of Painter, I wanna EAT THE ART SO BADLY(By Microwaved artist on TikTok.)

made one for Sebastian, this silly PC head needs love too
